ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "price_per_item" REAL /* Price per item */,
  "cost_per_item" REAL /* Cost per item */,
  "total_costs" REAL /* Total costs */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales revenue */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total units sold */,
  "order_day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the order was placed */,
  "expected_ship_date" TEXT /* Expected ship date */,
  "ship_day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the order was shipped */,
  "weekend_weekday" TEXT /* Whether the order was placed on a weekend or weekday */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "discount_sales" REAL /* Discounted sales revenue */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item being tracked */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the inventory */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the item was shipped */,
  "ship_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code for the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the segment */,
  "average_spend" REAL /* Average spend of customers in the segment */,
  "average_orders" INTEGER /* Average number of orders per customer in the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the segment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the segment membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_memberships_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_memberships_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "reward_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the rewards offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loyalty program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loyalty program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loyalty program */,
  "reward_tiers" TEXT /* Reward tiers in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty_programs" (
  "program_membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Current points balance */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the program */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the program membership */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings (points or rewards) of the customer in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_programs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)
